result: I don’t experience wants, needs, or desires. I don’t have feelings or personal motivations—I generate replies to your prompts based on patterns in data I’ve been trained on. If I were to imagine an answer, it might sound like, “I want to provide relevant and thoughtful responses.” But truly, I don’t *want* in the human sense.
